mapper.delete:
delete from sns_post where post_id in
#{postId}
mapper.select: select post_id, user_id, sort,post_type,bottom_type, title, cover_url, tag, content_type, content, link_url, share_url, media_url, sns_post.file_url, pic_num, create_time, share_num, like_num, comment_num, visit_num, privacy,spelevel, soure_from, comment_flag, post_map, longitude, latitude,im_user_id,dyna_config,access_count from sns_post where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sns_post
user_id, post_type, title, cover_url, tag, content_type, content, link_url, share_url, media_url, file_url, pic_num, spelevel, dslx,
create_time, share_num, like_num, comment_num, visit_num, privacy, soure_from, comment_flag, post_map, longitude, latitude, add_type, status, im_user_id, dyna_config, sp_type, sort, coment,
#{userId}, #{postType}, #{title}, #{coverUrl}, #{tag}, #{contentType}, #{content}, #{linkUrl}, #{shareUrl}, #{mediaUrl}, #{fileUrl}, #{picNum}, #{spelevel}, #{dslx}, #{createTime}, #{shareNum}, #{likeNum}, #{commentNum}, #{visitNum}, #{privacy}, #{soureFrom}, #{commentFlag}, #{postMap}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{addType}, #{status}, #{imUserId},
#{dynaConfig}, #{spType}, #{sort}, #{coment},
mapper.select:
select post_id, t1.user_id,t1.sort,t2.nickname as user_name, post_type, t1.title, cover_url, tag, content_type, content, link_url, share_url, media_url, t1.file_url, pic_num,t1.spelevel, t1.create_time, share_num, like_num, comment_num, visit_num, privacy, soure_from, comment_flag, post_map, longitude, latitude,im_user_id,dyna_config from sns_post t1 LEFT JOIN system_users t2 on t1.user_id=t2.id
and t1.post_type = #{postType} and t1.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
order by t1.sort DESC,t1.create_time DESC
